name: supercharged
description: A comprehensive set of scripts for setting up a developer-friendly macOS environment

scripts.setup: npm run restore:dotfiles && ./scripts/mac.sh && npm run validate
scripts.update: (./scripts/backup-claude.sh || echo '⚠️  Claude backup skipped') && (./scripts/backup-codex.sh || echo '⚠️  Codex backup skipped') && npm run restore:dotfiles && ./scripts/update.sh
scripts.backup:all: npm run backup:claude && npm run backup:codex
scripts.restore:all: npm run restore:claude && npm run restore:codex && npm run restore:dotfiles
scripts.pretest: command -v bats >/dev/null || (echo '❌ bats not found. Install with: brew install bats-core' && exit 1)
